codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review passed. Reviewed the worker handoff for commit 348fa7ca, validated the reported scope and verification evidence, and checked the committed diff shape for the feature. Added a new SalesCoreEngine coverage test class and expanded existing dispatch, inventory, invoice, DTO, controller, fulfillment, proforma-boundary, and sales tests to cover the O2C dispatch/commercial truth paths introduced in the packet. Updated ci/pr_manifests/pr_business_slice.txt to include the missing O2C tests and marked the routed classes with @Tag("critical") so the pr-fast business-slice shard contributes the needed JaCoCo coverage for PR #97 changed-files gating. Non-blocking follow-up remains limited to remote PR reruns or stale GitHub checks, not local code defects.

summary: Pass. Closed the local O2C changed-files coverage gap for PR #97 by adding focused dispatch/commercial regression tests, routing them through the PR-fast business slice, and tagging the routed classes as critical so the shard actually executes them. The local changed-files coverage reproduction against diff base 808cd576 now exits 0 with thresholds satisfied, and gate-fast plus review-guideline validation also pass.
